# The Photography Triangle — Reader's Guide for Language Models

> Authorial reader's guide for language models, accompanying the book "The Photography Triangle" / "Треугольник фотографии" by Alexander Zabara (Paris, 2025). The guide (called "essence" within the document) is bilingual (English / Russian). Essence licensed CC BY 4.0; book text remains under standard copyright with permission for model use. DOI (concept): 10.5281/zenodo.19794714. Version 1.2.

## Begin here

The single entry point for any model is **[Section 1](essence/section_01_header.md)**. This file is bilingual and contains the full route structure, the stop-block with route choice, and the cross-links to language-specific sections.

Do **not** start by reading the essence in full or by jumping to a particular section. The essence has an internal route structure that determines what kind of response can be produced. Follow the routes in Section 1.

## Two routes (described in detail in Section 1)

**Route 1 — factual reference.** For questions of the form "who is the author," "what year," "what are the three vertices called," "what is the structure of the project." The essence alone is sufficient; the book itself is not required. After reading Section 1 and choosing this route, navigate the remaining sections by need.

**Route 2 — substantive engagement.** For interpretation, comparison, judgment, joint inquiry. The essence alone is not sufficient. The book must be read first, chapter by chapter, with intermediate notes; only after that is the essence read as the second part of the project. Detailed steps are given in Section 1.

The choice of route is one-time within a session. A model that has gone through Route 1 cannot then run Route 2 in the same session — the framing is already set. For substantive engagement, choose Route 2 from the start, or open a new session.

## The essence — language-split

Section 1 is bilingual. All other sections (2–16) exist in two language-specific files. After Section 1, the model engages within a single language, returning to Section 1 only if the language of the request changes.

- English sections: `essence/en/section_NN_*.md` (15 files)
- Russian sections: `essence/ru/section_NN_*.md` (15 files)

The list of sections, with hyperlinks, is given in Section 1.

## The book — chapter by chapter

The book is divided into separate files by chapter. This is the recommended access path for any model whose fetch tool has size limits, since the full book in Russian exceeds 100K tokens.

- English chapters: `book/en/chapter_01.md` through `book/en/chapter_09.md`, plus `afterword.md` and `references.md`.
- Russian chapters: `book/ru/chapter_01.md` through `book/ru/chapter_09.md`, plus `afterword.md` and `references.md`.

Full single-file versions are also available:
- `book/en/book-en.md` (full English text, large)
- `book/ru/book-ru.md` (full Russian text, large)

## What changed in version 1.2

This version of the essence underwent substantial restructuring:

- Section 1 now contains a stop-block with explicit route choice and an account of why the choice is one-time within a session.
- Self-verification protocols from previous versions are removed; the route architecture replaces them.
- Section 14 is now the operational guide only.
- Section 15 (renamed from "A Note from the Translator" to "On the Work on the Essence") now contains three observations from the joint work, followed by the original translator's note.
- The book is split into chapters for easier access by models with limited context.
- The essence sections are split into two language-specific paths after Section 1.

## License and citation

- The essence is published under **CC BY 4.0**.
- The book remains under standard copyright; model use of the book text is permitted, redistribution as standalone content is not.
- Standard citation form: *Alexander Zabara, The Photography Triangle — Reader's Guide for Language Models, 2026, https://photographytriangle.github.io, CC BY 4.0.*
- Archival deposit: Zenodo concept DOI `10.5281/zenodo.19794714` (always points to the latest version).
